title: tarenna confusa
intro: Tarenna confusa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Tarenna confusa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
